title: ayenia obliqua
intro: Ayenia obliqua, also known as the "false buttonbush" or "buttonbush of the desert", is a plant species belonging to the Malpighiaceae family. Traditionally, Ayenia obliqua has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. Ayenia obliqua can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
